query:
SELECT sba.serviceExternalId, s.planName, s.supplierName, s.monthlyCost, sba.billingItemExternalId
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
WHERE s.dataSource LIKE '%Xero%'
LIMIT 20;
